content:
# Final Review Proposal
**Producer:** agent:codex/gpt-5.3-codex-spark-xhigh

## Summary

I found 1 fix-now issue in the modified snapshot artifact: a removed planner field remains persisted in the final-review stage resolution snapshot, which breaks the stated acceptance criteria.

## Amendments

1. finding: `.ralph-burning/projects/aro-1/run.json` still serializes legacy final-review planner resolution data. In the newly added active-stage snapshot, `final_review_planner` appears at lines 33-36 under `active_run.stage_resolution_snapshot`; the retained `last_stage_resolution_snapshot` also still contains `final_review_planner` at lines 73-76. This violates the contract to remove planner from final-review panel snapshots and can reintroduce planner-specific state in new run artifacts.
   Rationale: Remove `final_review_planner` from new persisted snapshots (active and last stage-resolution snapshots) when writing final_review stage state; keep only reviewer + arbiter fields.
